description: MCP server for interacting with the Etsy marketplace API, enabling search, listing management, shop operations, and order retrieval.

tools.name: search_listings
tools.description: Searches for active listings on the Etsy marketplace using keywords and optional filters for category and price range.

keywords.description: Search keywords or query terms to match against listing titles, tags, and descriptions.

category.description: Category slug to filter results to a specific Etsy category (e.g., 'jewelry', 'vintage').

min_price.description: Minimum price threshold to filter listings by item cost.

max_price.description: Maximum price threshold to filter listings by item cost.

limit.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 10, maximum: 100).

count.description: The total number of listings matching the search criteria.

results.description: Array of listing objects matching the search query.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the Etsy listing.

title.description: The display title of the listing.

price.description: The monetary price information for the listing.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO currency code (e.g., USD, EUR).

quantity.description: The available stock quantity for the item.

shop_name.description: The name of the Etsy shop offering the listing.

url.description: The direct URL to view the listing on Etsy.

images.description: Array of image URLs for the listing.

tools.name: get_listing_details
tools.description: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific Etsy listing including description, materials, tags, shop information, and high-resolution images.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the Etsy listing to retrieve.
The unique identifier of the Etsy listing.

title.description: The display title of the listing.

description.description: The detailed HTML or text description of the item.

price.description: The monetary price information including divisor for formatting.

amount.description: The raw numeric price value before divisor application.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO currency code (e.g., USD, EUR).

divisor.description: The divisor to convert the raw amount into the display price.

quantity.description: The available stock quantity for the item.

shop.description: Information about the shop selling the item.

shop_id.description: The unique identifier of the Etsy shop.

shop_name.description: The display name of the shop.

url.description: The URL to the shop's Etsy page.

rating.description: The average customer rating score for the shop.

images.description: Array of image objects with dimension metadata.

url.description: The URL to the full-resolution image.

full_height.description: The height of the image in pixels.

full_width.description: The width of the image in pixels.

tags.description: Array of search tags associated with the listing.

materials.description: Array of materials used to create the item.

shipping_profile.description: Shipping configuration and cost details for the listing.

tools.name: create_listing
tools.description: Creates a new product listing within a specified Etsy shop. Requires OAuth authentication with appropriate write permissions.

shop_id.description: The unique identifier of the Etsy shop where the listing will be created.

description.description: The detailed item description supporting HTML formatting.

price.description: The item price in the shop's default currency.

taxonomy_id.description: The Etsy taxonomy/category classification ID for proper categorization.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the newly created Etsy listing.

title.description: The title of the created listing.

state.description: The current state of the listing (e.g., 'draft', 'active', 'inactive').

creation_tsz.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the listing was created.

url.description: The URL to view the newly created listing.

tools.name: get_shop_listings
tools.description: Retrieves all listings for a specific Etsy shop with optional filtering by listing status.

shop_id.description: The unique identifier of the Etsy shop.

status.description: Filter listings by current state (active, inactive, expired, sold_out, draft).

limit.description: Maximum number of listings to return per page (default: 25, maximum: 100).

count.description: The total number of listings returned for the shop.

results.description: Array of listing summary objects for the shop.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the Etsy listing.

title.description: The display title of the listing.

state.description: The current state of the listing (e.g., 'active', 'inactive').

price.description: The monetary price information for the listing.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO currency code (e.g., USD, EUR).

tools.name: get_receipts
tools.description: Retrieves order receipts (sales transactions) for a seller's shop, optionally filtered by creation date range.

shop_id.description: The unique identifier of the Etsy shop.

min_created.description: Minimum creation timestamp (Unix epoch seconds) to filter orders from a specific start date.

max_created.description: Maximum creation timestamp (Unix epoch seconds) to filter orders up to a specific end date.

count.description: The total number of receipts matching the query criteria.

results.description: Array of order receipt objects representing completed sales.

receipt_id.description: The unique identifier of the order receipt.

buyer_email.description: The email address of the buyer.

name.description: The full name of the buyer.

grandtotal.description: The total monetary amount charged for the order including shipping and taxes.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO currency code (e.g., USD, EUR).

status.description: The current fulfillment status of the order (e.g., 'paid', 'shipped', 'canceled').

created_tsz.description: Unix timestamp when the order was created.

transactions.description: Array of individual transaction objects comprising the order.
